overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action-adventure game showing two characters, a woman and child, navigating a stormy coastal village. They walk past wooden structures, encounter enemy soldiers, and traverse a rain-lashed wooden dock extending into turbulent waters.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal hillside path with wooden farmhouse

events.description: enemy soldier with yellow shield appears from around the house corner
soldier walks past the characters and continues along the path

agents.ego_description: Amicia holding Hugo's hand while walking up the dirt path toward the farmhouse

notable_agents.action: enemy soldier with yellow shield and club walking past the characters along the house wall

entered.detail: weathered wooden house with steep roof and lit window
rocky hillside wall covered in dark vegetation
white tall grass growing along the path edge
muddy trail leading up to the house

segments.scene_description: The characters walk up a muddy hillside path toward a weathered wooden farmhouse during a heavy storm. Tall white reeds line the left side while a stone wall rises beside them. An enemy soldier with a yellow shield emerges from around the house corner and walks past them, creating a tense moment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow path alongside farmhouse descending toward coast

events.description: path begins descending steeply toward the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking along the house wall and down the slope toward the ocean, moving away from the farmhouse

entered.detail: rickety wooden stick fence lining the right side of the path
stormy sea visible in the distance between structures

segments.scene_description: Moving past the farmhouse, the path descends steeply toward the coast. The wooden structure now looms on the left while a rickety stick fence appears on the right. The stormy ocean becomes visible in the distance as they leave the hillside vegetation behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock walkway between coastal shacks

events.description: emerging from between buildings onto open pier structure
passing an enemy soldier standing guard on the wooden dock

agents.ego_description: navigating the wooden walkways between shacks, approaching the open pier by the water

notable_agents.action: enemy soldier in yellow and black armor standing guard on the dock

entered.detail: weathered wooden pier surface wet from rain and waves
thick rope barriers along the dock edge
large cargo net hanging from wooden frame
turbulent waves crashing against the shore

segments.scene_description: The characters navigate narrow wooden walkways between coastal shacks, transitioning from dirt to wooden planks. They pass an enemy soldier standing guard before emerging onto the open pier. Rope railings line the path as the turbulent ocean becomes visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pier end overlooking stormy ocean

events.description: characters stop at the end of the dock to observe the ocean waves

agents.ego_description: standing at the dock's edge with Hugo, watching the stormy waves and distant rock formations

entered.detail: stacked wooden crates and barrels at dock edge
jagged rock formations rising from the stormy ocean

segments.scene_description: Reaching the open end of the pier, the characters stop to observe the stormy seascape. Wooden barrels and crates line the right side while a cargo net hangs on the left. Jagged rocky islands rise from the turbulent water in the distance as rain lashes the dock.

events.description: sudden cut to indoor wooden room with torch lighting

agents.ego_description: standing inside a wooden room facing a window showing the storm outside

entered.detail: rough wooden plank walls of the interior
lit torch mounted on the wall providing warm light
closed wooden storage chest against the wall
small window showing stormy sky and rain outside

segments.scene_description: The scene cuts abruptly to a dimly lit wooden interior. A torch on the left wall casts flickering light across rough wooden planks. Through a small window at the far end, the storm continues to rage outside, connecting this shelter to the tempestuous coastal environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a rain-drenched hillside through a coastal village, ending in the flickering shelter of a wooden interior. It begins with the characters ascending a muddy path lined with white reeds and a stone wall, passing a weathered farmhouse where an enemy soldier creates a moment of tension. As the path descends steeply toward the coast, the hillside vegetation gives way to a rickety fence and the first glimpse of a stormy ocean. The camera then follows the characters as they transition from dirt to narrow wooden walkways between coastal shacks, passing another guard before emerging onto an open pier filled with barrels, crates, and a view of jagged rocky islands. Finally, the scene shifts abruptly into a dimly lit wooden room where a flickering torch casts light across the planks, with the raging storm still visible through a small window.
